_note: Synthetic news fixture in a GDELT-ish shape. Real GDELT 2.0 doc API: https://api.gdeltproject.org/api/v2/doc/doc

articles.title: Honeywell hit by ransomware affecting industrial software customers
articles.summary: Reports indicate a ransomware actor exfiltrated configuration data tied to Experion PKS deployments; CISA briefed customers.

articles.title: Workers at Moog Inc. East Aurora plant authorize strike vote
articles.summary: Machinists' union files strike authorization affecting servo drive production lines used in aerospace actuators.

articles.title: Safran warns of Tier-2 supplier disruption in landing gear program
articles.summary: Safran disclosed delivery delays after Tier-2 forging supplier reported equipment failure; impact to Airbus and Boeing programs under review.

articles.title: Collins Aerospace recalls firmware update over signature flaw
articles.summary: Collins Aerospace announces voluntary firmware recall for ARINC 615A data loaders following discovery of unsigned LSAP path.
